---
title: "03 Iverse probability weighting"
author: "Yuze Zheng"
date: "2026-02-20"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup}
library(fastglm)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
load('dt+ps_matched+0309.RData')
keep <- c('dt','ps_matched')
rm(list = setdiff(ls(), keep))
```

# Step1: data cleaning remove all the trtment after intional treatment 
```{r}
dt_cleaned <- dt[, trt_time := which(trt == 1)[1], by = id]
dt_cleaned <- dt_cleaned[cal_time <= trt_time | is.na(trt_time) == T]
```

```{r,fig.height=5,fig.width=6}
dt_cleaned %>% select(trt, cal_time)%>% group_by(cal_time)%>% summarise(per_A = sum(trt)/100000) %>% 
  plot(main = "Proportion of \n Treatment Initiation Overtime ",
       sub = 'under assumption n = 100,000',
       ylab =" Percentage of Initiation (%)",
       xlab = "Time after eligible (Month)", ylim = c(0,1))
```
```{r}
cat("the precent of treated individual in this dataset is",sum(dt_cleaned$trt)/nrow(dt_cleaned)*100, "%")
```
# Step 2: estimate population trt 
```{r}
mat_boot_numA <- model.matrix(~ cal_time + cal_timesqr, dt_cleaned)
A <- dt_cleaned$trt
numprobA <- fastglm(x = mat_boot_numA,
                    y = A,
                    family = binomial(link = "logit"))
```

#Step 3: estimate A by individual 
```{r}
mat_boot_denomA <- model.matrix( ~ L + cal_time + cal_timesqr, dt_cleaned)
denomprobA <- fastglm(x = mat_boot_denomA,
                        y = A,
                        family = binomial(link = "logit"))
```


#Step4: weight estimation
```{r}
dt_cleaned$ipw.num <- predict(numprobA, mat_boot_numA, type = "response")
dt_cleaned$ipw.denom <- predict(denomprobA, mat_boot_denomA, type = "response")
dt_cleaned$wt <- ifelse(dt_cleaned$trt == 1,
                        dt_cleaned$ipw.num / dt_cleaned$ipw.denom,
                        (1 - dt_cleaned$ipw.num) / (1 - dt_cleaned$ipw.denom))
```

we can not visualize the result of IPW weighting here because there are too many control too less treatment

#merge 
```{r}
df <- merge(
  dt,
  dt_cleaned[, .(id,cal_time,wt)],
  by = c("id", "cal_time"),
  all.x = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
trt_wt <- dt_cleaned[cal_time == trt_time, .(id, wt_trt = wt)]
df <- merge(df, trt_wt, by = "id", all.x = TRUE)
df[cal_time > trt_time & is.na(wt), wt := wt_trt]
df[, wt_trt := NULL]
```

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = wt, fill = as.factor(trt))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5, colour = "grey50") +
  geom_rug() +
  ggtitle("Distribution of inverse probability weights")
```

```{r}
dt_IPW <- df
```
